sector: Public agencies (local governments, special districts, schools, etc.)
incentive_basis: Lifecycle avoided GHG (CET/TSB-aligned); enhanced rates for underserved/HtR agencies
indicative_rate_guidance: Fact sheet estimates ~ $0.01–$0.02 per lifetime kWh saved; check current rate card with PM
enhanced_offers: 2023 limited-time HPWH coverage (free for underserved or up to 80% for others)
processing_sla: Initial review ~10 business days; technical review ~30 business days
eligibility_summary: Enrolled or enrollable public agencies within SoCalREN footprint; projects across HVAC, lighting, RCx, envelope, pumping, process, etc.; incentives paid to the entity funding the project.
measures_scope: Deemed measure directory + custom calculated projects
docs_directory_version: Deemed Measure Directory last update May 23, 2025 (separate PDF)
urls: Implementation Plan PDF; Fact Sheet PDF; Electrification report (HPWH offer); SSP landing page
contact: SoCalREN Public Agency Program — Project Manager via socalren.org/agencies/register
